title.zh: 我们现在应该开发这个 AI 功能 MVP 吗？
title.en: Should we build the AI feature MVP now?

question.zh: 团队是否应该现在投入两名工程师，用 30 天完成这个功能的 MVP？
question.en: Should the team spend two engineers for 30 days building the MVP now?

current_state.zh: 用户目前只给了方向性问题、少量访谈反馈和模糊资源约束，信息还不完整。
current_state.en: The user has only provided the directional choice, a few interview signals, and fuzzy resource constraints, so the picture is still incomplete.

hypothesis.zh: 目标用户在接触该功能后的 14 天内，会表现出足够强的付费意愿。
hypothesis.en: Target users will show enough willingness to pay for the feature within 14 days of exposure.

success_metric.zh: 至少 5% 的目标用户愿意预订或明确承诺付费。
success_metric.en: At least 5% of target users pre-order or commit to pay.

source_summary.zh: 对目标用户的结构化访谈

label.zh: 在 concierge 测试中愿意预订的用户
label.en: Users willing to pre-order in a concierge test

summary.zh: 12 位目标用户中有 5 位对该能力表达了强需求。
summary.en: 5 of 12 target users expressed strong demand for the capability.

notes.zh: 口头表达的需求可能会高估真实付费意愿。
notes.en: Stated demand may overstate real willingness to pay.

summary.zh: 一个接近的竞品最近上线了类似功能。
summary.en: A close competitor recently launched a similar feature.

notes.zh: 这是间接证据，同时也可能意味着竞争会更激烈。
notes.en: This is indirect evidence and may also imply stronger competition.

name.zh: 历史相关实验转化偏弱

summary.zh: 过去相关实验的转化率大约只有 3%。
summary.en: Past related experiments converted at roughly 3%.

notes.zh: 参考类相似，但并不完全一致。
notes.en: The reference class is similar but not identical.

name.zh: 现在直接开发完整 MVP
先做 7 天 landing page 测试

candidates.zh: 先跑一个 7 天的 landing page 测试，至少拿到 100 个目标用户访问样本。
candidates.en: Run a 7-day landing-page test with at least 100 target-user visits.

candidates.zh: 优先收集预订或押金信号，而不是只看口头兴趣。
candidates.en: Collect pre-order or deposit signals instead of stated interest.

candidates.zh: 基于更可比的产品类型和买方细分重新校准参考类。
candidates.en: Re-check the reference class using comparable products and buyer segments.

initial_problem_statement.zh: 我们只有模糊方向判断，想先知道值不值得继续推进。
initial_problem_statement.en: We only have a rough directional question and want to know whether it is worth pushing further.

initial_state.zh: 样本量小、证据混杂、还没有真实行为数据。
initial_state.en: The sample is small, the evidence is mixed, and there is no real behavioral data yet.

user_input_summary.zh: 用户先描述方向、目标用户和资源约束，但没有给真实转化行为数据。
user_input_summary.en: The user describes the direction, target user, and resource constraints, but provides no real conversion behavior yet.

assistant_focus.zh: 先给一个弱先验，并明确缺的关键信息是什么。
assistant_focus.en: Start with a weak prior and make the missing information explicit.

new_information.zh: 当前只有少量访谈和类比信息。
new_information.en: Only a few interviews and analogy signals are available.

assistant_next_questions.zh: 有没有真实预订、押金或点击数据？
assistant_next_questions.en: Do we have any real pre-order, deposit, or click data?

assistant_next_questions.zh: 历史上最接近的参考类转化率是多少？
assistant_next_questions.en: What is the closest historical reference-class conversion rate?

interim_judgment.zh: 还不能决定是否投入开发，先补行为数据。
interim_judgment.en: It is too early to commit to development; gather behavior data first.

user_input_summary.zh: 用户补充了 concierge 测试中的预订和押金数据。
user_input_summary.en: The user adds pre-order and deposit data from a concierge test.

assistant_focus.zh: 用更强的行为证据重跑判断，并检查旧证据是否重复计入。
assistant_focus.en: Re-run the judgment with stronger behavioral evidence and check for double-counting.

new_information.zh: 拿到了早期用户的真实预订行为。
new_information.en: Early users produced real pre-order behavior.

assistant_next_questions.zh: 这些高意向用户后续会不会持续使用？
assistant_next_questions.en: Will these high-intent users keep using it afterward?

interim_judgment.zh: 方向开始变得更可信，但还没有足够信息支持重投入。
interim_judgment.en: The direction is becoming more credible, but still does not justify a heavy commitment.

user_input_summary.zh: 用户补充了成本约束、实验阈值和成功条件。
user_input_summary.en: The user provides cost constraints, experiment thresholds, and success conditions.

assistant_focus.zh: 把更新后的概率映射到行动阈值，判断是否具备决策条件。
assistant_focus.en: Map the updated belief to action thresholds and decide whether the case is ready.

new_information.zh: 有了明确的实验阈值与下一步行动门槛。
new_information.en: The experiment thresholds and next-step gates are now explicit.

interim_judgment.zh: 现在可以做正式决策，但最优动作仍然是先跑低成本验证，而不是直接重投入。
interim_judgment.en: The case is now ready for a formal decision, but the best move is still a low-cost validation before a full build.
